headlines.description: — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice.
headlines.shortLinkText: Williams throws 4 TDs and TE Kmet handles long snaps for Bears in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London

events.name: Arizona Cardinals at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Romeo Doubs wanted to make amends after serving a one-game suspension for what the Green Bay Packers described as conduct detrimental to the team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Doubs catches 2 TD passes in his return from a suspension to help Packers rout Cardinals 34-13

headlines.description: — Joe Flacco has been around the NFL long enough to know the backup quarterback should always be ready to start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Joe Flacco throws two TD passes as the battered Colts beat the Titans 20-17

events.name: Houston Texans at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — C.J. Stroud threw three touchdown passes and the Houston Texans spoiled the first start of rookie New England quarterback Drake Maye, breezing past the Patriots 41-21 on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: C.J. Stroud throws 3 TD passes as the Texans beat the Patriots 41-21 in Drake Maye's first start

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — To Baker Mayfield, the way the Tampa Bay Buccaneers weathered a wild second quarter in which they lost a 17-point lead was symbolic of their mindset ever since they traveled to New Orleans on Tuesday to escape the path of Hurricane Milton.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mayfield passes for 4 TDs as the Bucs treat storm-weary fans to a 51-27 win over the Saints

headlines.description: — Perhaps indignant that Eagles fans had chanted for his firing, Nick Sirianni could not button up his mouth in the final seconds. Philadelphia's coach — already a habitual trash-talking offender — put a finger to his right ear and chirped at fans in...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jalen Hurts throws 2 TD passes as the Eagles hold off the Browns 20-16

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson threw nine passes to Zay Flowers in the first half and never went to him again. Mark Andrews rebounded from a ball bouncing off his hands for an interception to catch his first touchdown pass of the season. And Derrick Henry was...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jackson outduels Daniels and Henry runs for two TDs as Ravens beat Commanders 30-23

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Denver Broncos

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert and the Los Angeles Chargers had to concern themselves with Patrick Surtain II for only a single snap Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert leads Chargers to 23-16 win over the Broncos, who lose Surtain to a concussion

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Najee Harris broke free down the left sideline, reached the 5-yard line and dived toward the pylon, just getting the ball across the goal line for a Steelers touchdown.
headlines.shortLinkText: Najee Harris' first 100-yard rushing game this season lifts Steelers to 32-13 win over Raiders

headlines.description: — Jared Goff's completion streak ended on his first throw.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes, Lions win 47-9 and hand Cowboys another lopsided home loss

headlines.description: — The Atlanta Falcons are proving they have multiple ways to win — especially against a division foe.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bijan Robinson scores 2 TDs. Falcons beat Panthers 38-20 for 3rd straight victory vs. NFC South foe

events.name: Cincinnati Bengals at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow made just enough plays and the maligned Bengals defense stepped up and delivered a much-needed victory that gave Cincinnati some hope after a dismal start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Joe Burrow runs for a TD and the Bengals' defense carries them past the Giants, 17-7
